steps.t: Arvedui and Lothrandir are conversing outside Sûri-kylä. You should listen to the conversation.
Arvedui and Lothrandir are having a conversation outside Sûri-kylä. You should talk to Lothrandir when they are finished.
Arvedui and Lothrandir are talking. You should listen to the conversation.
Arvedui is ready to show you the way to Agoroth. Talk to Arvedui to travel to Jä-reitti.
Frost grims block your path deeper into the ice caves. You should defeat the frost grims.
You must be close now! You should help Arvedui reveal the hidden door! Say the password 'Dolen uin Belegoth' aloud to reveal the door.
